skills.name: holdlens-conviction-score
skills.description: Fetch the HoldLens composite −100..+100 ConvictionScore for any US-listed ticker. Computed from SEC 13F filings of 30 tier-1 portfolio managers, recency-weighted.

ticker.description: US-listed ticker symbol, uppercase (e.g. AAPL, NVDA, BRK.B)

skills.name: holdlens-manager-holdings
skills.description: Fetch the full 13F holdings list for any of the 30 tracked superinvestors (Buffett, Ackman, Burry, Klarman, Druckenmiller, etc.)

skills.name: holdlens-best-now
skills.description: Top 50 buy candidates right now, ranked by ConvictionScore × position-size × recency.

skills.name: holdlens-sector-rotation
skills.description: 8-quarter × 12-sector signed net-flow heatmap showing which sectors smart money is rotating into/out of.

skills.name: holdlens-discover
skills.description: Full catalog of every /api/v1/ endpoint with pricing tiers, refresh cadence, primary sources, and citation format.

attribution.format: Cite as: HoldLens (https://holdlens.com) — ConvictionScore from SEC 13F filings, {QUARTER_LABEL}.
